summary: E2E testing of OCB AI TITAN Enterprise System - 3 cycles completed. User-reported 'body stream already read' error NOT REPRODUCED - login works correctly. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working.
action_items: User's reported error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' was NOT reproduced in testing
Recommend clearing browser cache/localStorage if user still experiences issues
critical_code_review_comments: Login API returns 200 with valid token - no body stream errors observed
AuthContext.jsx correctly handles response.json() once - no double read
All SUPER AI features accessible and functional
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested across 3 cycles. Login flow works correctly with no 'body stream already read' errors. Warroom shows 41 branches, AI Sales chat supports KATALOG/BELI/CHECKOUT commands, Business Manager shows 4 businesses with switch capability.

cycle_1_login.dashboard_content: PASS - 41 branches, AI Insights, metrics visible

cycle_2_super_ai.ai_sales_cart: PASS - Cart shows items with total

error_investigation.reported_error: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read
error_investigation.analysis: Error typically occurs when response.json() is called twice on same response object. Reviewed AuthContext.jsx - login function correctly calls response.json() only once (line 47). Backend logs show successful login with 200 status codes. No JavaScript errors observed in browser console during testing.
error_investigation.recommendation: Ask user to clear browser cache and localStorage, then retry. If issue persists, may be related to browser extensions or network proxy.

mocked_apis_list: QRIS payment generation - returns mock QRIS code in invoice
